title.en: Xuanlin Mountain Boundary, inside a valley.

content.en:
Xuanlin Mountain Boundary, inside a valley.

Ye Tian began to attack the Dao Realm here.

Although he didn't have a secret medicine to assist in breaking through, he had found several treasures in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm that could help impact the Dao Realm.

Moreover, he also perfected the secret art of gathering stars.

The Gathering Stars Secret Technique is the Ultimate Dao Secret Technique of the True River Valley, which helps to impact the Dao Realm, allowing ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlords to have a one-percent breakthrough success rate.

But it didn't help his true body much, so he has been trying to perfect the Star Gathering Secret Technique all these years.

Now, the Gathering Stars Secret Technique has been perfected a lot, and even his true body probably has a success rate of more than one percent.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian was here to hit the Dao realm again and again.

In the past, the bottleneck was almost difficult to shake, but with the help of his ninth sequence ninety out of two solstice rule, the bottleneck was a little slackened, but even so, the success rate of the breakthrough was not high.

Moreover, every time a breakthrough fails, it falls directly, without a single exception.

It is said that in the Taisu Palace, there is help to save the life of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who broke through the failure, but the price paid is relatively large, and there is no way to use that kind of price without a certain background.

Ye Tian naturally doesn't have this kind of life-saving means, but he has a copy of his body, and he doesn't need to pay too much price for impacting again and again.

After many failures.

this day.

After Ye Tian broke the shackles, he began a real transformation.

Rumble!!!!!

The rules of the Supreme Dao, the origin, the power of the Extreme Dao of Reincarnation, and the body were perfectly integrated, and the aura on the body became more and more terrifying.

Moreover, under the effect of the Origin of the Infinite Domain, the aura belonging to the Origin Realm on his body was gradually obscured.

It can be said that as long as he hides a little in the future, it will not be easy for him to be seen through as a native of the Origin Realm.

This transformation has been going on for a long time, and his strength has been skyrocketing, far exceeding any previous growth.

......

"It's completely solidified!"

In the past few days, in the process of breaking through, he has also been attacked by many creatures in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, but fortunately, other replica bodies are trying their best to resist and sacrifice a lot of replica bodies.

Moreover, his luck is also good, he did not encounter the Dao Strange Thing, otherwise the breakthrough would have to be delayed.

"I'm too strong now, far beyond what I used to !!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't know what level of strength he had reached, but he could kill his past self in an instant.

This is definitely not the strength of the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, it may already be comparable to the Quadruple Dao Realm.

Moreover, after he broke through, he was not moved out of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and his strength was not suppressed.

Obviously, the Xuanlin Mountain Realm only thought that he was a Dao realm cultivator.

"Hahaha, with my current strength, the huge Xuanlin Mountain Realm is at my disposal!"

Ye Tian felt that he could scrape a large amount of resources in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and he could even obtain the resources that would impact the Dual Dao Realm.

Subsequently.

He began to scrape resources everywhere, and the creatures here were no match for him.

this day.

He encountered the Dao Strange Thing again, and it was the Xuanming Drum of the Dao Strange Thing that he had encountered before.

Airplanes!!!!!

The sound of the Xuanming drum kept coming, which made Ye Tian a little upset, but it couldn't hurt him.

Immediately, he directly killed the Xuanming Drum.

In an instant, the strange figure carrying the Xuanming Drum directly held the Xuanming Drum behind him in his hand, and immediately beat the Xuanming Drum.

Suddenly, a wave of terrifying attacks fell on Ye Tian's body and the surrounding area.

Many space, space, and voids were shattered, and even Ye Tian continued to crack.

Even if he used the perfected Supreme Dao Divine Power of the Supreme Dao Vajra Body, he could only withstand it.

"Must be melee or I'll be killed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He performed the Dao Flow Body Technique, and approached the Dao Strange Thing Xuanming Drum.

However.

The Xuanming Drum, a strange thing, seemed to be able to sense the danger, and a strange fluctuation spread.

Suddenly, the distance between Ye Tian and the Xuanming Drum seemed to be infinitely widened.

"Break it for me!

Ye Tian used all his strength to use the Dao Extreme Spear Technique, and finally barely broke through this strange fluctuation and killed the Xuanying Drum.

Immediately.

Dense guns pierced through.

Any spear can kill the Triple Dao Realm in an instant, but this strange figure stretched out a black arm and waved it to form a black arm in the sky, blocking Ye Tian's spears one after another, and then crushing them.

Ye Tian's attack landed on the strange figure, like an ordinary person's wooden spear hitting the iron wall.

"The Wonder of the Dao is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is still the weakest of the most Dao strange things!

With continuous attacks and killings, Ye Tian could hardly shake the other party.

He found that no matter how much he attacked, he couldn't hurt the other party in the slightest.

But if it is said that the other party's strength far surpasses his own, then it will not be, otherwise he would have been killed in an instant.

But the other side does not have such strength.

After fighting for a while, Ye Tian suddenly discovered a problem, that is, no matter how the other party fought, he would protect the Xuanming Drum.

"That's right, the most strange thing Xuanming Drum, the Xuanming Drum is the body, and that weird figure is just the embodiment of the power of the Xuanming Drum. Maybe the weird figure is unbreakable, no matter how strong the strength is, it is difficult to do it, only by breaking the Xuanming Drum can it be killed!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He tried to attack the Xuanming Drum, and sure enough, the other party kept blocking it.

"One real body copy body is not enough, there are several more real body copy bodies, I don't believe that it can't be killed!"

Soon.

Ye Tian's other true body copies came over, and they all besieged this supreme Dao strange thing, the Xuanming Drum.

Thundered!!!!

Under the siege again and again, the Xuanming Drum of the Dao Strange Thing was a little overwhelmed.

Click!

Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique finally attacked the Xuanying Drum, leaving a gap on it.

At this time, Ye Tian obviously felt that the combat power of the Xuanming Drum had dropped a little.

"Sure enough, the Xuanming Drum is the body, and only when you hurt the Xuanming Drum can you hurt the weird figure!"

Afterwards.

Ye Tian injured the Xuanming Drum again and again, and finally killed the Xuanming Drum completely.

Boom!

The Dark Drum burst open and shattered.

And the strange figure also completely dissipated.

Just after the Xuanming Drum, Ye Tian found a fragment inside it, which seemed to be a special drum fragment, which was the core of the Xuanming Drum.

Ye Tian picked up this piece of fragment and sensed the strong supreme path rule aura on it, and it was not an ordinary supreme path rule aura.

"This is the eighth sequence of the supreme rule !!!!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Originally, he was still worried about how to comprehend the rules of the eighth sequence, but he didn't expect to find a treasure containing the rules of the eighth sequence of the supreme path.
